name: Cannoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the sugar, flour, and salt.
2. Gradually work in the wine, kneading to a soft dough.
3. Roll out on a floured surface to 1/8-inch thickness.
4. Cut out five-inch discs.
5. Wrap each disc around a cannoli form, sealing the edge with egg white.
6. Heat oil (about 5 inches deep) in a small, deep saucepan.
7. Fry one at a time until golden and crisp. Remove with tongs and let the oil run off.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Let the pastry cool slightly, then carefully slip it off the form.
10. Filling: In a mixing bowl, beat the ricotta with an electric mixer.
11. Add the remaining filling ingredients.
12. Stuff shells just before serving.
13. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
Note: Shells will keep for a week or two in a sealed container, so they can be made ahead.
